'''Mole serpents''' were burrowing predators native to the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. They dwelt almost entirely underground and ranged from 10-28 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long. One such creature escaped into the deserts of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The creatures are the natural predators of the [[Tirginni beast]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}
